title: Requesting a New Laptop or Peripheral Hardware
text:
Q: How do I request a new laptop or peripheral hardware?
A: To request a new laptop or peripheral hardware, please follow these steps: Windows: Step 1: Open the company intranet and log in with your employee credentials. Step 2: Navigate to the 'IT Support' section and select 'Hardware Requests'. Step 3: Fill out the request form, providing details about the hardware you need and the reason for the request. Step 4: Submit the form and note the confirmation number for tracking. macOS: Step 1: Access the company intranet and log in using your employee credentials. Step 2: Go to the 'IT Support' section and click on 'Hardware Requests'. Step 3: Complete the request form, including the type of hardware required and justification for your request. Step 4: Submit the form and keep the confirmation number for your records. Once your request is submitted, the IT team will review it and get back to you within 3-5 business days. If you have any urgent needs, please contact the IT helpdesk directly via email or phone. Remember to check the company policy on hardware requests for any specific guidelines or limitations.
